message:
test(mvcc): add compression policy and version chain resolution tests

Expands MVCC compression test suite with five new tests:
- resolve_mixed_chain: verifies that VersionData::Identical correctly
  walks back to the nearest Full variant across a mixed chain of
  Full and Identical entries
- compression_stats_dedup_ratio: validates dedup ratio calculation
- compression_stats_empty: ensures sane defaults (0% dedup, 1.0x ratio)
- policy_defaults: asserts default CompressionPolicy has dedup enabled,
  max chain length 64, no compression algo
- policy_none: asserts CompressionPolicy::none() disables all features

ext4 ondisk: minor adjustment to str2hashbuf tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
